Graph..personality: A sluggish, irresolute individual who tends toward obesity and physical stagnation, with a deep sensitivity to environmental conditions—easily chilled yet equally distressed by warmth. They are averse to mental exertion and prefer open air, displaying a general heaviness and paralytic weakness that pervades both body and mind.
Graph..mental_state: Marked mental dullness and slowness of thought, worst in the morning, with an inability to concentrate on close mental work and a dread of intellectual effort. Memory is paradoxically split—vivid recall of distant youth but forgetfulness of recent events—accompanied by profound irresolution, an inability to make decisions, and restless mental activity in the evening that prevents sleep until midnight.
Graph..emotional_pattern: Extreme melancholic depression dominated by thoughts of death and salvation, intensely aggravated by music, with constant mood fluctuations between morning despair and evening excitability. Fretful, impatient, and irritable over trifles, prone to deep anxiety reaching desperation, with grief and vexation triggering recurrence of all mental suffering.
